title: Timeline Start and End Dates not options in Custom Automation
excerpt: I’d like to use a Timeline’s Start or End date in my custom automation but do not see the options that are referenced in the post here : Automations based on Timeline Start Date - #8 by Dani which show this. Has this fun…

posts.author: paulski (Paul Berry)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to use a Timeline’s Start or End date in my custom automation but do not see the options that are referenced in the post here : Automations based on Timeline Start Date - #8 by Dani which show this. Has this functionality been removed?
